recipe.title: Wednesday: Chicken Alfredo with Penne (from scratch)
ingredients: 2½ lbs chicken breast, cut into bite-size pieces
Extra Parmesan and cracked pepper for serving
steps: Pat chicken dry. Toss with olive oil, Italian seasoning, garlic powder, salt, and pepper.
Heat large skillet over medium-high. Add chicken in a single layer (work in batches). Cook 4–5 minutes per side until golden and internal temp reaches 165°F. Transfer to a plate; tent with foil.
Bring large pot of water to a boil. Add salt. Cook penne until al dente (about 11 minutes). **Reserve 1 cup pasta water** before draining.
In the same skillet used for chicken, melt butter over medium. Add garlic; cook 60–90 seconds until fragrant (don't brown).
Pour in cream and milk. Bring to a gentle simmer (don't boil).
Whisk in Parmesan a handful at a time until smooth. Add nutmeg. Season with salt and pepper.
Simmer 2–3 minutes to thicken. Splash in pasta water if too thick.
Add drained penne and chicken (plus juices) to sauce. Toss gently to coat. Serve with extra Parmesan.
